description: A person renting an apartment wants a quote for renters insurance.

nodes.task_description: Gather the applicant's address and desired amount of personal property coverage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects the necessary information for a renters quote.

nodes.task_description: Explain the difference between personal property coverage and liability coverage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains what each part of the policy covers.

nodes.task_description: Generate and present a quote for a standard renters policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a quote for the requested coverage.
